hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: All four signals are flat with negative composite scores and elevated volatility, especially ETH and SOL. Betas above 1 for the altcoins and negative alphas signal downside bias. LTC shows the weakest composite and the most negative alpha, making its signal the most fragile. In line with the council and counsellor guidance we adopt a defensive posture, trim overall exposure, and apply modest negative conviction adjustments to preserve capital.

counsellors.grok:
